mission.title: Install and Configure Bank Vaults on Kubernetes
mission.description: Bank-Vaults is a CLI tool designed to simplify the initialization, unsealing, and configuration of Hashicorp Vault, making it easier to manage secrets in cloud-native environments. Installing Bank-Vaults allows you to streamline secret management and enhance security in your Kubernetes applications.

steps.title: Add the Bank-Vaults Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the official Bank-Vaults Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration. This will allow you to easily install Bank-Vaults using Helm.
```bash
helm repo add bank-vaults https://bank-vaults.github.io/charts
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Bank-Vaults using Helm
steps.description:
Install Bank-Vaults in your Kubernetes cluster. This command will create a new namespace called 'bank-vaults' and deploy the Bank-Vaults application.
```bash
helm install bank-vaults bank-vaults/bank-vaults --namespace bank-vaults --create-namespace --version v1.32.1
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check if the Bank-Vaults pods are running successfully in the 'bank-vaults' namespace. This step ensures that the installation was successful.
```bash
kubectl get pods --namespace bank-vaults
```

steps.title: Configure resource limits
steps.description:
Set resource limits for the Bank-Vaults deployment to ensure it runs efficiently within your cluster. Modify the deployment configuration as needed.
```bash
kubectl patch deployment bank-vaults --namespace bank-vaults -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"containers":[{"name":"bank-vaults","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"512Mi"}}}]}}}}}'
```

steps.title: Set up RBAC for Bank-Vaults
steps.description:
Create a Role and RoleBinding to grant necessary permissions for Bank-Vaults to operate within the Kubernetes cluster.
```bash
kubectl create role bank-vaults-role --verb=get,list,watch --resource=pods --namespace bank-vaults
kubectl create rolebinding bank-vaults-rolebinding --role=bank-vaults-role --serviceaccount=bank-vaults:default --namespace bank-vaults
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation of Bank-Vaults will show the Bank-Vaults pods in a running state when you execute the 'kubectl get pods' command. Additionally, resource limits and RBAC settings should be applied correctly to ensure optimal operation.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add bank-vaults https://bank-vaults.github.io/charts
helm repo update
helm install bank-vaults bank-vaults/bank-vaults --namespace bank-vaults --create-namespace --version v1.32.1

kubectl create role bank-vaults-role --verb=get,list,watch --resource=pods --namespace bank-vaults
kubectl create rolebinding bank-vaults-rolebinding --role=bank-vaults-role --serviceaccount=bank-vaults:default --namespace bank-vaults

prerequisites.description: You need a Kubernetes cluster and Helm installed to deploy Bank-Vaults.
